videos.title: Tour of the Borders 2017, part 1
videos.description:
Tour of the Borders 2017, part 1
wave 14, Peebles to Talla Reservoir

videos.title: There and back - A sunny evening ride in Scotland
videos.description: After a Scottish summer of rain I filmed a rare sunny evening ride on my Kinesis Tripster ATR. It was an exploratory ride on the wild side of Glentress in the Scottish borders.

videos.title: Aberfeldy to Crieff. (Honda CB500X)
videos.description:
Route Link: https://goo.gl/maps/hnKdo1ASy8n
From Fortingall I cross the river Tay and pass through Aberfeldy to Crieff. The end of a great day out. Thanks for watching this series.
